touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn outreach to Liam Diallo at FluxMedia regarding sales-to-CS handoff automation. No response received.
Initial cold email sent to Liam Diallo highlighting pain points in sales-to-CS transitions. No response.
Follow-up email with case study on reducing handoff errors. No response received.
Brief cold call connected with Liam. He acknowledged handoff challenges but was in a meeting. Agreed to schedule a proper conversation.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently experiencing any friction in your sales-to-CS handoff process?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we've had some issues with context getting lost between teams.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Liam to understand FluxMedia's current process. He described manual handoffs causing delays and context loss. Team uses Fireflies for call recording but lacks automation. Liam interested in learning more about our automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for transitioning deals from sales to customer success?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual - sales reps fill out a handoff doc and schedule a sync call with CS. Takes about 2-3 hours per deal.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution differ from Fireflies, which we already use?
questions_asked.answer: Fireflies focuses on recording and transcription. We automate the entire handoff workflow, extracting key deal context and pushing it directly into your CS workflows.

next_steps: Liam to audit current handoff time/errors
Schedule deeper discovery call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call. Liam shared that their team wastes 15-20 hours weekly on handoffs and CS misses critical context about 40% of the time. Discussed team size (9 people involved) and budget considerations. He wants to see a demo focused on automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What's the business impact of these handoff failures?
questions_asked.answer: We've had 3 customer escalations this quarter where CS didn't know about specific commitments made during sales. It's hurting retention.

questions_asked.question: What kind of budget range should we be thinking about?
questions_asked.answer: For 9 seats with consulting to set up the automation workflows, typically $8-12K annually depending on configuration needs.

next_steps: Schedule demo for next week
Liam to identify specific use cases for demo

touches.ai_summary: Deep discovery call exploring FluxMedia's sales and CS tech stack, workflow bottlenecks, and pain points. Liam detailed their HubSpot setup and current Fireflies usage. Discussed integration requirements and specific automation triggers they need. He's the primary decision-maker but mentioned wanting to loop in their CS lead eventually.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through a recent handoff that went poorly - what broke down?
questions_asked.answer: Two weeks ago, a sales rep promised custom onboarding but didn't document it. CS started standard onboarding and the customer was frustrated. Took a week to fix.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: I own sales operations, so I can make this call. I'll probably bring in Sarah from CS before we sign, but I'm driving this.

questions_asked.question: Can this integrate with HubSpot and our existing Fireflies recordings?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native HubSpot integration and can pull from Fireflies transcripts to enrich the automation.

objections: We already pay for Fireflies - not sure we want to add another tool cost.
next_steps: Prepare demo with HubSpot integration showcase
Schedule demo for end of week

touches.ai_summary: Full product demo showcasing sales-to-CS handoff automation with live HubSpot integration. Walked through automated field extraction, workflow triggers, and CS notification system. Liam engaged throughout, asking technical questions about setup and customization. He liked the Fireflies integration but expressed concern about implementation time and cost compared to just using Fireflies more effectively.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: With our automations plus consulting package, about 3-4 weeks to get fully configured and your team trained.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we want to change the automation workflows later?
questions_asked.answer: You'll have self-service access to modify triggers and fields. For complex workflow changes, consulting hours are available.

questions_asked.question: On a scale of 1-10, how well does this address your handoff challenges?
questions_asked.answer: Probably an 8. It's comprehensive, but I need to think through whether we really need all this versus optimizing our Fireflies setup.

objections: This feels like a bigger investment than I initially expected. Fireflies is already paid for.
next_steps: Send proposal with pricing options
Liam to discuss internally with CS lead
Schedule proposal review call

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call. Presented $10,500 ACV for 9 seats with automations plus consulting package. Liam appreciated the ROI breakdown but pushed back on price, comparing to their $3K/year Fireflies spend. Discussed potential to reduce scope or get discount. He's interested but needs to make the numbers work.

questions_asked.question: Is there a version without the consulting that would be cheaper?
questions_asked.answer: We could do automation-only at $8,500, but setup would be more manual on your end and take longer.

questions_asked.question: What budget did you have in mind for solving this problem?
questions_asked.answer: Honestly, I was thinking closer to $6-7K. We're a small team and already have Fireflies.

objections: The price is higher than I can justify given we already have a call recording solution.
next_steps: Rep to check on potential discount options
Liam to calculate ROI for exec justification
Follow up via email with revised pricing

touches.ai_summary: Email follow-up with revised proposal at $7,500 ACV (27.8% discount) to fit within Liam's budget constraints. Included ROI calculator showing 15 hours/week savings. Liam responded positively, saying this price makes it feasible and he wants to move forward.

questions_asked.question: Is this price locked in for the first year or does it go up at renewal?
questions_asked.answer: This is your locked rate for year one. Renewals typically increase 5-8% annually, but we'll work with you based on usage and value.

next_steps: Schedule call to finalize terms
Liam to review contract language

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call to finalize contract terms. Discussed payment terms, implementation timeline, and support SLAs. Liam comfortable with annual payment and 30-day implementation window. Asked about contract length flexibility - agreed on 12-month term. He mentioned wanting to schedule a quick exec alignment meeting with his VP before signing.

questions_asked.question: Can we do monthly payment instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: At this discount level, we need annual payment. We can do quarterly if that helps with cash flow.

questions_asked.question: When do you need this implemented by?
questions_asked.answer: End of Q2 would be ideal, so we can start Q3 with the new process.

next_steps: Send final contract for review
Schedule brief exec alignment meeting
Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Exec alignment meeting (originally scheduled earlier in week, rescheduled to today). Brief overview for Liam and context on the deal. Liam presented the business case. No VP or exec sponsor attended - Liam explained his VP trusts his judgment on sales tools and doesn't need to be involved. Discussed next steps for contract signature and implementation kickoff.

questions_asked.question: Will your VP need to review the contract before you can sign?
questions_asked.answer: No, I have signing authority up to $15K for sales operations tools. I'll get this signed this week.

questions_asked.question: What's the process after signature for kicking off implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We'll assign a dedicated implementation consultant within 2 business days and schedule your kickoff call to map out the 30-day plan.

questions_asked.question: Any remaining concerns before we finalize?
questions_asked.answer: No major concerns. I'm confident this will solve our handoff issues. Just want to make sure your team is responsive during implementation.

next_steps: Liam to sign contract by end of week
Implementation kickoff scheduled for following Monday
